arts.ttl: Everton, Liverpool and Slot charged after derby melee
arts.sum: Everton, Liverpool and Arne Slot are charged by the Football Association after incidents at the end of Wednesday's Merseyside derby at Goodison Park.

arts.ttl: David Moyes Finch Farm joke becomes reality as Everton crisis emerges from Liverpool chaos
arts.sum: Everton return to Premier League action against Crystal Palace on Saturday evening

arts.ttl: Liverpool and Everton issued FA charges after mass brawl, red cards and post-match chaos
arts.sum: The FA have confirmed their charges for Liverpool and Everton in the aftermath of Wednesday's chaotic Premier League clash at Goodison Park, which saw a brawl, four red cards and a pitch invasion

arts.ttl: FA release statement as Everton, Liverpool and Arne Slot all charged after Goodison chaos
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot has been charged by the Football Association following his red card in the Goodison derby at Everton on Wednesday

arts.ttl: I loved the fight Everton took to Liverpool. Putting them on their a***s... That's how a football match should be, writes GRAEME SOUNESS
arts.sum: GRAEME SOUNESS: As human beings, we like aggression. We like to see confrontation. It's a gladiatorial instinct that goes right back to Rome's Colosseum in the first century AD.

arts.ttl: 'It was totally off-the-cuff': The wedding party which went to a Palace game
arts.sum: Selhurst Park isn’t just a Premier League football ground, but the heart of a vibrant and diverse community, whose anecdotes stretch back a century. Here – on Valentine’s Day – we hear from John Suter, the subject of one of the stadium’s most remarkable romantic stories...

arts.ttl: Glasner on one year at Palace, and facing Everton & Moyes…
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner will complete one full year as Crystal Palace manager next week (19th February) – but ahead of his anniversary, he and his side are seeking a sixth win in eight matches in all competitions, taking on Everton this weekend...

arts.ttl: What Michael Oliver told Jordan Pickford moments before Everton equaliser vs Liverpool
arts.sum: James Tarkowski's 98th minute equaliser ensured that Everton fought back to draw 2-2 with Liverpool in the final Merseyside derby at Goodison Park - before things kicked off on the field post match

arts.ttl: Journalist provides clarification on Everton loan clause – Situation could change in coming weeks
arts.sum: Charly Alcaraz’s two appearances for Everton so far will not count towards the six appearances that will make his move a permanent one. That’s according to journalist Venê Casagrande, who provides clarification on the clause included in the midfielder’s loan deal from Flamengo. Alcaraz joined the Toffees on loan at the end of the January The post Journalist provides clarification on Everton loan clause – Situation could change in coming weeks appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Everton only able to name 13 senior outfield players in squad for Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Neither Seamus Coleman nor Nathan Patterson are expected to return for this weekend
